title: Dazzling Metallic Pink Number 9 Birthday Candle - Perfect Cake Topper for Unforgettable Milestones - 1 Pc
features: DAZZLING METALLIC DESIGN: Make your loved one's big day extra special with our eye-catching metallic pink number 9 birthday candle, designed to create unforgettable memories and add a vibrant touch to any celebration.

HIGH-QUALITY WAX MATERIAL: Made from durable, non-toxic wax, this candle has a premium feel that ensures it won't easily break or bend, giving you peace of mind as it sits atop your cake and creating lasting memories.

IDEAL FOR MEMORABLE MILESTONES: Whether it's a birthday party, anniversary, or other significant events, this cake topper is designed to make your special day picture-perfect and absolutely unforgettable.
EASY TO USE: Our metallic pink number birthday candle is ready to go right out of the box, simply place it on top of your cake and watch as it enhances the overall look of your party.

BOOST YOUR CELEBRATION'S CHARM: Enhance your cake's presentation and create everlasting memories with our alluring metallic pink number 9 birthday candle - a must-have decorative element for any party planner or host looking to impress their guests.
description: From the manufacturer Metallic Pink Numeral Candles Show your age in elegant fashion with these bright and vibrant candles! These pink metallic coated candles are ideal to add a shine to any Birthday with a pink motif, so make a wish and blow out the candles!
